address: 5370 Campbellton Fairburn Rd, Ste 430, Fairburn, GA 30213
category: Med-spa, wellness + urgent & primary care clinic
tagline: South Fulton's trusted same-day care and wellness spa under one roof.
brand_angle: South Fulton's trusted same-day care and wellness spa under one roof — now with a brand as elevated as the care.

services.title: Walk-In Urgent & Primary Care
services.desc: Same-day treatment for cold, flu, infections, lacerations, plus on-site X-ray, labs, and sports/school physicals — open 7 days a week in Fairburn.

services.title: Wellness Spa & IV Hydration
services.desc: Facials, body waxing, IV hydration drips, and recovery therapies including the Cocoon Fitness Pod to hydrate before events or bounce back after.

services.title: Medical Weight Loss & Aesthetics
services.desc: Physician-guided weight-loss programs, Botox, and esthetic care paired with mental-health counseling for whole-person wellness.

review_note: Aggregate rating 4.9 with 339 reviews verified from the Solv Health listing on 2026-05-31. No individual review quotes were verified from a primary source, so none are reproduced or invented (Commandment: never invent reviews).
